visual_templates.andrey_kira_pool: Scene: night pool, mature man and athletic woman standing in water facing each other, hand with ice cube on wrist, water up to chest, steam rising, another man watching from edge, warm water lighting, cinematic close-up, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, 8K, film grain --ar 16:9 --cfg 5.5 --steps 50

eucalyptus.description: Запах эвкалипта в парной — якорь расслабления и отпускания контроля.

wood_heat.description: Тепло деревянных стен и полок — якорь примитивного комфорта и безопасности.

cold_water_splash.description: Холодная вода после жара — якорь адреналина и пробуждения.

candlelight.description: Свечи на втором этаже — якорь интимности и уязвимости.

ice_cube.description: Кубик льда на коже — якорь 'вызов', созданный Андреем.

atmosphere_layers.P1: nervous anticipation, first exposure, laughter too loud, silence too deep
atmosphere_layers.P1b: dominance enters, laughter fades, someone is louder than the room
atmosphere_layers.P2: heat, steam, bodies relax but minds sharpen, gazes become longer
atmosphere_layers.P2b: intimacy without touch, words as weapons, silence as caress
atmosphere_layers.P3: contrast, shock, adrenaline, bodies remember what minds deny
atmosphere_layers.P3b: ice and fire, touch that burns cold, the moment before choice
atmosphere_layers.P4: softness, tea, warmth, but eyes drift to the door, to the balcony, to the absent
atmosphere_layers.P5: night, snow, final choices, the end of 'what if' and the beginning of 'what is'
